Smart Security

The Future of Entry is Here

Our digital lock series combines cutting-edge biometric technology with elegant design. Fingerprint recognition, PIN access, smart camera, and emergency key backup.

  • Fingerprint Biometric Access
  • PIN Code Entry
  • Smart Camera with Display
  • Emergency Key Override
  • App Connectivity (Select Models)

Creativity that redefines luxury with its mystical curves. Premium hardware solutions manufactured in Aligarh, India.

ALL PRODUCTS

Complete range of premium hardware solutions — 57 products across 9 categories

⚲

CRAFTING SECURITY
WITH ELEGANCE

For over two decades, POLLO Hardware has been at the forefront of premium door hardware, combining traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design language.

Our Philosophy

At POLLO, we believe that security should never compromise aesthetics. Every product in our range is designed to be a statement piece — a blend of robust engineering and refined visual design that complements the spaces they inhabit.

Our team of designers and engineers work tirelessly to stay ahead of architectural trends, ensuring our hardware solutions align with the evolving demands of modern interiors.

Manufacturing Excellence

Manufactured and marketed by Swiss India in Aligarh, U.P. — the hardware capital of India — our production facility employs precision manufacturing processes and rigorous quality control.

Our material range spans Stainless Steel, SS/Zinc alloy, Mild Steel, and premium Brass, each chosen for its unique combination of durability, workability, and aesthetic properties.

Our Journey

FOUNDATION

Swiss India Established

Founded in Aligarh, U.P. — the world's largest hub for lock and hardware manufacturing.

EXPANSION

POLLO Brand Launch

Launched the POLLO brand with a focus on premium finishes and designer aesthetics.

INNOVATION

Digital Lock Range Introduced

Entered the smart security segment with PL-series digital locks featuring fingerprint, PIN, and camera access.

2025

Complete Product Overhaul

Launched the 2025 catalogue with 57 products across 9 categories including new SMH and ZMH series with premium two-tone finishes.
